_meta.note: DynamoDB record for the same user_id as the Redis sample. Note this record contains ONLY the lamp; the rug from the Redis cache is missing. updated_at is 14:01:08 ET (16 seconds before the rug was added). The rug was added at 14:01:24 ET; that write hit DynamoDB throttling and the SDK retries failed; the cart-update Lambda's Promise.allSettled accepted the cache-only success and returned 200 to the client.
